scripts.build: npm --prefix server run build && npm --prefix frontend run build
scripts.ci:check: npm run build && npm run test:unit && npm run smoke:ui && node scripts/with-test-server.mjs npm run smoke:api
scripts.agent:check: npm run build && npm run test:unit && npm run smoke:ui && node scripts/with-test-app.mjs npm run smoke:browser && node scripts/with-test-server.mjs npm run smoke:api && node scripts/agent-check.mjs
